title: Peter Grill and the Goblin Apocalypse
overview: Did someone say goblins? Peter just received orders to hold back a horde of female goblins invading the countryside.

title: Peter Grill and the Goblin Who Returned the Favor
overview: While Peter weeps in his cell, an Elite Hobgoblin named Gobuko unexpectedly comes to his rescue. It’s almost as though she’s got something on her mind…

title: Peter Grill and the Only Neat Thing to Do
overview: When humans successfully route the horde, is extermination the only solution? This looks like a job for a completely different kind of goblin slayer!

title: Peter Grill and the World’s Strongest Little Sister
overview: Lucy Grill certainly has a lot of guts. Why, she’ll just go berserk if she ever finds out her brother cheated on Luvellia!

title: Peter Grill and Family Ties
overview: Peter’s already complicated life grows more so when Lucy joins the Warriors Guild. He needs to be extra careful now!

title: Peter Grill and the Enjoyment of the Spa Resort
overview: Peter needs a break after everything he’s gone through. Unfortunately for him, certain someones have other plans.

title: Peter Grill and a Family Disgraced
overview: After being abducted from the spa resort, Peter awakens and stands before Vegan’s sister! Three guesses what she wants.

title: Peter Grill and the Sisterly Feud
overview: Vegan won’t just stand around and let her sister take Peter away!

title: Peter Grill and the Essence of an Apology
overview: Vegan and Fulltalia's sibling rivalry is getting out of hand!

title: Peter Grill and the Dwarven Alliance
overview: The Guildmaster vows to acknowledge Peter if he reaffirms the Guild’s alliance with the Dwarves? Peter smells a trap...

title: Peter Grill and the Inescapable Room
overview: Peter and Misslim get locked in a room together, and the only way they can escape is by performing a suspiciously specific action…

title: Peter Grill and the Future Legacy
overview: The Guildmaster’s plan pays off! Fortunately for Peter (but unfortunately for everyone else), the Dwarves’ natural predator chooses this moment to attack the ceremony.
